title: CTOV - Advanced Peripheral Compat
description: Compatibility datapack between CTOV and Advanced Peripheral mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Advanced Peripherals. You will find some labs in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric. 

**Advanced Peripherals mod**

Advanced Peripherals mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancedperipherals)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
